name: IpGetSocketName
title: IpGetSocketName
syntax: long IpGetSocketName( dword socket, dword &ipv4Address, dword &port); // form 1
long IpGetSocketName( dword socket, byte ipv6Address[], dword &port); // form 2
long IpGetSocketName( dword socket, IP_Endpoint localEndpoint ); // form 3
description: The function returns the local bound address and port of a socket.

parameters.name: ipv4Address
parameters.description: The numerical IPv4 address is returned in this variable.

parameters.name: Ipv6Address
parameters.description: A 16 byte array to return the IPv6 address.

parameters.name: localEndpoint
parameters.description: IP_Enpoint variable, where the address and port of the local endpoint is copied to.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
